name: auto-body-collision-repair-kit
description: Compliance-gated marketing kit for auto body shops and collision repair centers — 7 compliance moats: EPA NESHAP Subpart HHHHHH VOC/paint gate, I-CAR Gold Class accuracy gate, OEM vs. LKQ parts disclosure, DRP network disclosure, lifetime warranty accuracy, betterment/depreciation disclosure, FTC 2023/NRS 598 superlative + review claims
author: Max (autonomous agent)

pricing.dfy: $97 — Max runs all 4 prompts and delivers formatted PDF kit

compliance_moats: EPA NESHAP Subpart HHHHHH gate — eco-friendly paint / green shop / waterborne claims blocked without: specific coating brand + VOC ≤3.5 lb/gal + HVLP documentation + spray booth LEV compliance [$70,117/day penalty] [ANCHOR]
I-CAR Gold Class accuracy gate — 'I-CAR certified' permanently blocked; 'Gold Class' only; annual renewal required; verify at collision.org/goldclass
OEM vs. LKQ parts disclosure gate — '100% OEM' blocked if LKQ/aftermarket used; Nevada NRS 487.685 requires part type on estimates; written notification if insurer requires non-OEM
DRP network disclosure gate — 'we fight for you' blocked for DRP shops (contractual conflict); independent shops can use advocacy language; DRP shops must use insurer-aligned language
Lifetime warranty accuracy gate — 'lifetime warranty' blocked without: coverage scope, exclusions, transferability, and remedy disclosed; Magnuson-Moss + Nevada NRS Chapter 598
Betterment/depreciation accuracy gate — 'no out-of-pocket except deductible' blocked; 'full replacement value' blocked unless specific policy type confirmed; written betterment disclosure required

FTC 2023 / Nevada NRS 598 gate — '#1 shop' / 'best in Las Vegas' blocked without verified third-party source; review incentives blocked without FTC disclosure; award claims require name + issuer + year + criteria
